coffee.name: Terbodore Coffee Roasters
coffee.desc: Famous for their coffee and the Great Dane mascot.

coffee.name: Big Dog Cafe
coffee.desc: Modern venue with great brunch options.

coffee.name: Huguenot Fine Chocolates
coffee.desc: Strictly chocolate but the best in town.

fine_dining.name: La Petite Colombe
fine_dining.desc: Contemporary fine dining at Leeu Estates. High-theatre multi-course menus.

fine_dining.name: Epice
fine_dining.desc: Spice-driven fine dining with global flavors. An intimate and unique culinary journey.

fine_dining.name: Protégé
fine_dining.desc: Modern casual fine dining. Watch young chefs at work in the open kitchen.

fine_dining.name: Le Coin Français
fine_dining.desc: Classic French techniques blended with South African flavors.

fine_dining.name: Chefs Warehouse at Maison
fine_dining.desc: Tapas-style sharing plates overlooking the vines.

casual_dining.name: Reuben's Franschhoek
casual_dining.desc: Flagship of icon Reuben Riffel. Sophisticated brasserie fare.

casual_dining.name: Café du Vin
casual_dining.desc: Classic bistro atmosphere in one of the valley's oldest buildings.

casual_dining.name: Monneaux Restaurant
casual_dining.desc: Contemporary South African cuisine in an elegant setting.

casual_dining.name: The Station Pub
casual_dining.desc: Lively local favorite for burgers and craft beer.

casual_dining.name: L'Ami Family Brasserie
casual_dining.desc: Refined Cape Winelands cooking with a French family feel.

lunch_spots.name: Orangerie at Le Lude
lunch_spots.desc: Stunning French-inspired lunch. Famous for MCC and high tea.

lunch_spots.name: Grande Provence
lunch_spots.desc: Heritage setting with seasonal lunch plates. The Oak Terrace is a favorite.

lunch_spots.name: Two Lions
lunch_spots.desc: Hidden gem at La Bourgogne with a secluded garden terrace.

breakfast_spots.name: Smitten Café
breakfast_spots.desc: The best bakery and breakfast in town. Creative morning plates.

breakfast_spots.name: Terbodore Franschhoek
breakfast_spots.desc: Excellent coffee and hearty breakfasts in a lively cafe.

breakfast_spots.name: Get Lost Coffee
breakfast_spots.desc: Minimalist coffee bar with incredible pastries.

breakfast_spots.name: La Petite Ferme
breakfast_spots.desc: Gourmet breakfast with the best valley view in Franschhoek.

breakfast_spots.name: MIKO at Mont Rochelle
breakfast_spots.desc: Sophisticated breakfast offering within Richard Branson's estate.

vineyards.name: Anthonij Rupert Wyne
vineyards.desc: Premium red wines and two distinct tasting rooms: Manor House and Terra Del Capo.

vineyards.name: Boschendal Estate
vineyards.desc: One of SA's oldest farms. Award-winning wines and picnics under ancient oaks.

vineyards.name: Grande Provence
vineyards.desc: 325 years of winemaking history merged with contemporary art and luxury.

vineyards.name: Haute Cabrière
vineyards.desc: Home of the iconic Chardonnay Pinot Noir. Panoramic views and MCC cave.

vineyards.name: Dieu Donné Vineyards
vineyards.desc: Intimate tasting experience with the best sunset views in the valley.

activities.name: Franschhoek Wine Tram
activities.desc: Hop-on-hop-off adventure through the vineyards. The iconic way to see the valley.

activities.name: E-Bike Wine Tour
activities.desc: Guided half-day tour exploring hidden vineyards on electric bikes. Active and scenic.

activities.name: Franschhoek Motor Museum
activities.desc: Over 100 classic cars showcasing a century of motoring history. Stunning collection.

activities.name: Babylonstoren Gardens
activities.desc: Explore the 5-hectare fairytale garden. A botanical masterpiece.

activities.name: Mont Rochelle Reserve
activities.desc: 10 hiking trails with breathtaking vistas. Requires a permit (available at 66 Huguenot St).

trails.name: Mont Rochelle Nature Reserve
trails.desc: Stunning vistas of the Wemmershoek mountains. High elevation.

trails.name: Cats Path
trails.desc: Historical pass over the mountains with spectacular valley views.

trails.name: Babylonstoren Garden Walk
trails.desc: Gentle stroll through one of the world's most beautiful gardens.

trails.name: Rickety Bridge Vine-Walk
trails.desc: Scenic walk through the vineyards with a glass of wine in hand.

padel.name: Franschhoek Padel Club
padel.desc: Premier courts in the winelands. Book via Playtomic app.

padel.name: Pearl Valley Padel
padel.desc: Stunning courts at the nearby Val de Vie estate.

bars.name: The Station Pub
bars.desc: The local heartbeat. Historic train station with great beer and live sports.

bars.name: Entree Bar
bars.desc: Sophisticated cocktails and local craft beers on the main road.

bars.name: The Yard
bars.desc: Trendy meeting spot with a dedicated bar and artisanal vibes.

bars.name: Tuk Tuk Microbrewery
bars.desc: Craft beer and tacos in a vibrant industrial-chic setting.

stats_desk.name: Conference Venue Map
stats_desk.desc: Detailed map of the main hall and breakout sessions for the Statistics Conference.

stats_desk.name: Delegate Happy Hour
stats_desk.desc: Special discount at The Station Pub for conference name-tag holders. Starts at 17:00.

stats_desk.name: Taxi & Shuttle Service
stats_desk.desc: Preferred shuttle service for Franschhoek valley. Dial +27 21 876 2112.
